color_order.description: Color channels in data transmission order (RGB, GRB, BGR, RGBW, etc.), irrespective of endianness (usually big endian, MSB first)

led_voltage_notes.description: Additional details about voltage specifications from datasheets

clocked.description: True for protocols requiring a separate clock line (APA102-style), false for single-wire (WS2812-style)

vcc_voltage.description: Nominal VCC pin voltage for pixel IC. Often hidden from end users on integrated packages

pwm_frequency.description: PWM Frequency of outputs - how often the LED flashes if captured on high speed camera

pwm_frequency_notes.description: Additional details about PWM behavior (e.g., MPWM multiplexing, measured vs datasheet values)

brightness_bits.description: Color depth per channel (e.g., 8, 8+5 for global brightness)

brightness_control_method.description: How extra brightness bits work: 'pwm' for overlaid PWM, 'current' for LED current control, 'global' for whole-chip brightness

data_bitrate.description: Maximum or fixed bit rate for data transmission

data_bitrate_notes.description: Additional details about data rate specifications

pixel_data_size.description: Bits per pixel (e.g., 24 for RGB, 32 for RGBW or with global brightness)

pixel_data_size_notes.description: Additional details about pixel data format

pixel_rate_max.description: Maximum pixel frames per second (ignoring reset overhead). Divide by string length for theoretical max FPS

gpio_min.description: Lowest voltage that works as 'high' level input at nominal supply voltage

gpio_min_notes.description: Additional details about minimum GPIO threshold

gpio_max.description: Maximum voltage allowed at data input pin at nominal supply voltage

channel_current.description: Default/maximum current per color channel with built-in LED

channel_current_notes.description: Additional details about current (e.g., different package sizes, programmable ranges)

quiescent_current.description: Minimum current to controller when all LEDs off. Actual current above 5V depends on regulation method

package_size.description: Package size(s) as string for backwards compatibility

backup_data_line.description: Has failover/backup wire allowing data to continue if a pixel fails

max_pixels_per_string.description: Fundamental hardware limit on string length (not frame rate related). E.g., APA102 clock degradation limits to ~250

max_pixels_notes.description: Explanation of what limits max pixels (e.g., clock sensitivity, signal degradation)

release_year.description: First date on datasheet or based on Google trends

spec_update_year.description: Year specs were significantly updated (e.g., WS2812b PWM change in 2018)

technical_notes.description: Detailed technical notes from community testing and datasheet analysis

datasheet_discrepancies.description: Known differences between datasheet claims and measured values
